uncertainties.read: Field-split trust sheet. Present block = VALUE (Block B), a tight transposed 12-column Min/Max grid (columns: None / $1-$1,000 / $1,001-$15,000 / $15,001-$50,000 / $50,001-$100,000 / $100,001-$250,000 / $250,001-$500,000 / $500,001-$1,000,000 / $1,000,001-$5,000,000 / $5,000,001-$25,000,000 / $25,000,001-$50,000,000 / Over $50,000,000). Income-type, Amount-of-Income and Transaction blocks are on separate sheets and are null here; merge downstream by asset name. Asset slice = 'Ritu Ahuja Declaration of Trust', 27 assets (TRINITY HLS through UTIL DEBT SECURITIZATION).
uncertainties.note: value nulled per SPEC allowance: the 12 columns are ~90px apart with no gridlines and rows drift vertically, so exact per-row column assignment is not resolvable at this scan degradation without high off-by-one risk. Observed value-mark distribution across the 27 rows: the large majority sit in the two left value columns ($1,001-$15,000 and $15,001-$50,000) with a substantial cluster in the leftmost column (None or $1-$1,000 - ambiguous which), plus isolated marks further right (~$100,001-$250,000 near row 2 and ~$250,001-$500,000 near the bottom). Downstream should re-read quads/page-106-TR.jpg to pin per-asset values.
left-margin owner code reads as SP (spouse) throughout but is degraded; could be DC. Same code applied to every row of this trust slice, so any error is systematic.
